flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Florida State College at Jacksonville vs the 2018–2022 baseline (32.4% vs 38.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Florida State College at Jacksonville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Florida State College at Jacksonville rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (17.3k → 19.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Florida State College at Jacksonville rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (58.0% → 64.9%).
